/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/log/extras_sinks_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/log/formatter_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/log/logger_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/log/registry_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/log/simples_sinks_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/maths/mathsTests.cpp.o -o run_tests  ../libRST.a
